schedule.note: Day count from original send date. Do not follow up if reply received.

followup_1.subject_note: Prepend 'Re: ' to the original subject line
followup_1.body:
Just following up in case the note below is of interest.

Happy to provide additional background if helpful.

[SIGNATURE_BLOCK]

followup_2.body:
Circling back one final time. If the matter isn't a fit, no further follow-up from us.

If timing or circumstances change, the offer to share a brief case summary remains open.

[SIGNATURE_BLOCK]
